codeReview.summary: Implementation of model fallback chain Sonnet → GPT-4o → Haiku is correct and comprehensive. The ModelRouterBuilder::with_model_fallback_chain() method properly configures all task types with the 3-model fallback chain. For Fast tasks, the priority is correctly reversed (Haiku → Sonnet → GPT-4o) to prioritize speed and cost over quality. All 9 tests pass.

summary: Feature orch-model-fallback passes review. Implementation correctly provides graceful degradation across LLM providers with Sonnet as primary, GPT-4o as cross-provider fallback, and Haiku as final fallback. Fast tasks reverse this priority appropriately. Comprehensive tests cover primary success, individual fallback scenarios, all-fail error handling, and cross-provider fallback behavior. Build and tests pass without issues.
